race.description: Peter & Audrey Sharp Memorial Mdn Plate
race.comment: SPONARS (3) was very competitive through his last campaign at Provincial level and has won both of his trials this time in in impressive fashion. Ticks plenty of boxes from the inside barrier and Chambers sticks from the trials. Can return with a bang. DIRTY DANI (6) just missed at Wellington two back before a 0.7L defeat at Armidale before the short freshen when jumping the race favourite. Will need some luck from the wide alley, but she's shown good speed and talent in those outings. Can put her best foot forward. ROSELILY (9) only had one trial back in August last year and was scratched when slipping in the tie-ups before she was meant to debut at the end of March. McDougall's booking is a good push for her chances and she can make an impression on debut. ELASAND (7) bounced back to form last start and can be in the finish again. SYMBOL OF STATE (10) is racing well and is not to be discounted back slightly in trip.
